name: Komatsu Ltd.
description: Komatsu Ltd. is a Japanese multinational corporation that manufactures construction, mining, forestry, and military equipment, as well as industrial equipment like press machines, lasers, and thermoelectric generators. As the world's second-largest manufacturer of construction and mining equipment after Caterpillar, Komatsu provides essential machinery and solutions for infrastructure development and resource extraction globally. The company is a leader in autonomous haulage systems and is increasingly focused on electrification and sustainable technology within the heavy machinery sector to reduce environmental impact.
